title: ecpoma hierniana
intro: Ecpoma hierniana, a type of flowering plant, is a species in the family Rubiaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Ecpoma hierniana include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and protect against infections. Ecpoma hierniana can be prepared as a herbal tea or infusion, and its extracts have been studied for their potential use in treating various health conditions, although further research is necessary to confirm its efficacy and safety.
